text.title: WBS Creation Examples
text.summary: Worked WBS snippet (3 levels) for the checkout redesign.

example.title: Checkout redesign WBS snippet
example.context: Q2 checkout-redesign, signed scope baseline scope-statement-v2.
example.code: - 1.0 Payment redesign - 1.1 Stripe Payment Intents v2 integration - 1.1.1 API client refactor (owner: Iryna, est: 16-40h) - 1.1.2 Server-side intent creation (owner: Petro, est: 24-56h) - 1.1.3 Webhook handler (owner: Andriy, est: 8-24h) - 1.2 Apple Pay button rollout - 1.2.1 Front-end button (owner: Olena, est: 8-16h) - 1.2.2 iOS Safari test pass (owner: Olena, est: 8-16h) - 2.0 Session migration - 2.1 Cookie-to-JWT migration - 2.1.1 JWT issuer module (owner: Iryna, est: 16-32h)
example.commentary: Three levels, all leaves 8-80h, noun-led; dictionary entries authored per leaf; cross-check against baseline shows no gold-plating.
